address.Address: 428/1, Munu Adhi Road, Samathuva, Kishkintha Main Rd, Periyar Nagar West, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600063, India

address.streetAddress: 428/1, Munu Adhi Road, Samathuva, Kishkintha Main Rd, Periyar Nagar West, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600063, India

itemListElement.reviewBody:
MY EXPERIENCE WITH THIS SCHOOL HAS BEEN NOTHING SHORT OF A COMPLETE DISASTER. THE WAY THEY HANDLE FEES IS ABSOLUTELY UNPROFESSIONAL AND STRESS-INDUCING. Even if a parent is late by just two days, the school immediately sends messages that feel threatening saying the child might not be allowed to continue the next academic year or that their attendance could be affected. They keep calling parents to school over this, and honestly, the only person who even tries to understand parents’ situations is the manager.

The school claims they welcome feedback about teachers, but that is NOWHERE NEAR THE TRUTH. Students are not taken seriously at all. Based on what my child and many others have experienced, some teachers scold or threaten students for no valid reason and take out their frustration on them. The school shows NO REAL INTEREST IN ADDRESSING THESE ISSUES.

After the pandemic, the quality of teaching has GONE COMPLETELY DOWNHILL. This school used to be good, but now it feels like they’ve lost their experienced or genuinely dedicated teachers. Teachers in many state board schools show MORE PATIENCE AND PROFESSIONALISM than some of the teachers here. And if a student struggles academically, the school provides ZERO SUPPORT, NO INTERVENTION, NOTHING.

Because of all this, I decided to remove my child from the school. I refuse to let my child stay in an environment that FAILS TO SUPPORT THEM. From my experience, this school DOES NOT EVEN COME CLOSE TO THE STANDARDS OF AN IGCSE INSTITUTION. I dont know if this review will be deleted just because we made bad comment on the school, cuz thats what this school usually does, they dont encourage any negative facts on the school, instead they say the fault is on the student. Pointing the fact, as a parent i think the school changed completely after the new head staffs was introduced, i also heard many parents stating the same. Students are not found spoken in english at the school campus, and many illegal activities was found being done by the teacher at the school, this was heard recently. Like what is even this? I don't want any other student who is planning to come to this school to face things wrong. So this can be an awareness review too. And i hope any changes would happen, if the school reads this review. AND YEAH PET Periods are being occupied by the teachers TO COMPLETE THE PORTIONS, like how do you expect the student, to study 8 hours at school, and in the evening and also score marks, when there is NO OTHER EXTRA CURRICULAR ACTIVITIES OTHER THAN PT which is only 2 periods in the 7 days of a working week. AND YEAH THE SCHOOLS WEBSITE HAS MENTIONED THAT THERE IS DANCE KARATE YOGA ETC ETC ETC, LIKE PEOPLE NO NOTHING IS THERE Only Sports like Football Throwball Basketball and few are repetitively played and I have heard my ward stating that it's boring and i feel stressed to study in this school. I DONT WANT ANY OTHER KID TO FACE THE SAME. Food, Environment All are So good, but the things that is mentioned above is yeah. Threatening Kids with the camera that is fixed in the rooms, ALL THIS SCHOOL DOES IS THREATENING is what i am willing to conclude with.

I took admission for my son in Grade1 last year, I can see a lot of improvement in his general speaking skills.  I thought my son was an introvert. but he is showing good interest in extra curricular activities and sports nowadays.

Thanks to the Teachers for their continuous support.

When compared to other IGCSE schools in Chennai the fees structure here is much less.

We have just started at this school, our daughter is very happy here..
I would highly rate, they also offer a individual care to every student and motivate them to progress forward..
my daughter’s transition was made easier under the guidance of her teachers !
The teachers are Professional, caring and well organized. The management is outstanding, they really care and truly want the best for your child .

It's one among the fewest school with good infrastructure around Perungalathur... teachers are well experienced and professional... Fees structure is similar to other private schools, no comments on that... Just see what child gets back for the fees being paid...!!! so far my ward is performing well.. Management is good, cares about the reputation, they try to retain the teachers, that gives good progress... school is located quite interior from the main road, commuting during rainy season is bit difficult, but doesn't matter if you have opted for school shuttle... ignore negativity, every parent cannot be satisfied... if their ward performs well the school is good else its bad... for them every school will be the same...

Excellent school in this locality!! My daughter has been attending this school for the past 9 years. Teaching and their materials are too good. I would like to thank the teachers for being so efficient in whatever they teach and being friendly with the students at all times. would highly recommend this school!!
